protein_name: Thought to be involved in the organization of the cytomatrix at the nerve terminals active zone (CAZ) which regulates neurotransmitter release. Seems to act together with BSN. May recruit liprin-alpha proteins to the CAZ. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytoskeleton; GABA-ergic synapse; glutamatergic synapse; growth cone; presynapse; presynaptic active zone; presynaptic active zone cytoplasmic component; presynaptic membrane; synapse
raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; structural constituent of presynaptic active zone
raw_fields.Biological Process: maintenance of presynaptic active zone structure; regulation of calcium-dependent activation of synaptic vesicle fusion; regulation of presynaptic cytosolic calcium ion concentration; synaptic vesicle priming
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: CAST; CAST1; CAZ-associated structural protein; cytomatrix protein p110; ELKS/RAB6-interacting/CAST family member 2; ELKSL; ERC protein 2; ERC2; KIAA0378; MGC133063; MGC133064; SPBC110; Spc110
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.51 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
